eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Nance, NE; at 6:40 PM on JUN 11, 2026 Effective until 7:40 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Genoa residents can resume using water.  Please do not water lawn or garden in the meantime. Contact city officials if you need bottled water.
